sentences.arabic: تَسْتَثْمِرُ دُوَلٌ عَرَبِيَّةٌ كَثِيرَةٌ فِي قِطَاعِ التِّقْنِيَّةِ وَالِابْتِكَارِ.
sentences.translation: Mnoge arapske zemlje investiraju u sektor tehnologije i inovacija.
sentences.translationEn: Many Arab countries invest in the technology and innovation sector.

sentences.arabic: تُوجَدُ شَرِكَاتٌ نَاشِئَةٌ نَاجِحَةٌ فِي مَدِينَتَيْ دُبَي وَالرِّيَاضِ.
sentences.translation: Postoje uspješne nove kompanije u gradovima Dubaiju i Rijadu.
sentences.translationEn: There are successful startup companies in the cities of Dubai and Riyadh.

sentences.arabic: تَسْعَى هَذِهِ الدُّوَلُ لِتَطْوِيرِ الِاقْتِصَادِ عَنْ طَرِيقِ التِّكْنُولُوجِيَا.
sentences.translation: Ove države nastoje razviti ekonomiju putem tehnologije.
sentences.translationEn: These countries seek to develop the economy through technology.
